title: Instrument gateways
description: Benchling Connect instrument gateways (S3 Cloud or Local Windows).

items.title: Instrument gateway definition
items.description: Complete description of a Benchling Connect instrument gateway. A gateway is the infrastructure through which instrument files flow into and out of Benchling.

Description.description: Documentation for the gateway, including setup details and operational nuances. Not saved to Benchling.

Type.description: Gateway type. 'S3 Cloud' uses an AWS S3 bucket for cloud-to-cloud file transfer. 'Local Windows' monitors a directory on a Windows machine or network share.

Bucket.description: AWS S3 bucket name. Only applicable when Type is 'S3 Cloud'.

Bucket policy.description: AWS S3 bucket policy JSON generated by Benchling (Feature Settings > Instrument Gateways > Generate Policy). Grants Benchling's IAM role the required s3:ListBucket, s3:GetObject, and s3:PutObject permissions scoped to the tenant. Only applicable when Type is 'S3 Cloud'.

Diagram.description: Properties solely used for diagram rendering.

API ID.description: API ID for the gateway created during an export operation. This is ignored for import operations.
